response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong testing discipline and broad polyglot experience, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8-12 years of hands-on C++, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443/SDL industrial cybersecurity expertise. Their only meaningful C/C++ exposure was a ~7-month stint at National Instruments back in 2014-2015; the rest of their career is JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js. No evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443, MQTT, or message-broker architectures.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software engineering with strong craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD practices
Experience with distributed, high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Polyglot background including some C/C++ at National Instruments and systems-level work in DLang
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months in 2014-2015); no recent STL, modern C++, or multi-threaded C++ work
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to MQTT, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850), or automation/IoT domain

key_factors.factor: Missing industrial automation and IEC 62443 background
Strong general engineering and distributed-systems experience
